column2: The pizza was absolutely fantastic. Crispy crust and fresh toppings made it a memorable meal.
Expected much better. The pasta was overcooked and the service was slow.
Decent food overall. Nothing extraordinary but reliable and consistent quality.
Incredible flavors. The margherita pizza is a must-try. Will definitely come back.
Food was okay but nothing special. Prices are a bit high for what you get.
Great atmosphere and friendly staff. The tiramisu dessert was outstanding.
Pizza arrived cold and the waiter was unapologetic. Very disappointing experience.
Stumbled upon this place and was blown away. Authentic Italian recipes done perfectly.
The crust was soggy and toppings were sparse. Expected more for the price.
Staff went above and beyond. Food was fresh and portions were generous.
